title: Simple API Request
scenario: Create a simple API request for retrieving a list of products by sending a GET request to the '/products' endpoint. Include the API base URL and authentication token in the prompt, and ensure the output is readable.
constraints: Must use a clear, readable format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Verify if the API request syntax is correct.
Evaluate the output's readability and clarity.
